text:
The men’s football tournament at theParis2024Olympicsgets underway on 24 July with a lot of young talent but a few recognisable faces involved.

The 16 countries that qualified for the tournament have 18-man squads, with 15 of the players having to be born on 1 January 2001 or after.

That means they are effectively Under-23 squads, although three overage players can be named.

Not all the nations involved chose to take full advantage of that opportunity, withJapanactually naming no players over 23 years old, although they were the only ones to do so.

Team GB are not represented in the football tournament in Paris, but here’swhen Britain’s biggest stars of the Games will be in action.

Here are all the squads for the upcoming men’s football tournament in Paris, with their overage players picked out.

Metro's Head of Sport James Goldman delivers punchy analysis, transfer talk and his take on the week's biggest stories direct to your inbox every week.

Sign up here, it's an open goal.
